backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor that manages content sections, printable guides, and technicians with CRUD operations, includes blob storage mixin, and provides HTTP outcall functionality to fetch zip code boundary coordinates from a cloud function.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two features for making quick tip lightbulb icons clickable and enabling navigation to corresponding sections within educational content across four section components.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of frontend components including routing, educational content sections with clickable quick tips, photo scanner, quiz, printable guides, location finder, and various pest-specific content modules.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color palette for light/dark modes, smooth scroll behavior for hash navigation, and CSS custom properties for theming.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Pest Control Education app with root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component with QueryClientProvider that implements hash-based routing to conditionally render QR code page, location finder, home page, or educational content with header and footer.
frontend/src/components/BottomNavigation: Empty component file with no content.
frontend/src/components/EducationalConte: Main educational content component with seven-tab navigation (scanner, identify, habitats, prevention, treatment, guides, findLocalHelp) synchronized with hash routing, pest selection UI for 18 pests, and dynamic content rendering based on selected pest.
frontend/src/components/ErrorBoundary.ts: React error boundary component that catches render errors and displays a fallback UI with error details and a button to return to the main app.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component displaying copyright notice with caffeine.ai attribution and disclaimer text about the educational resource.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky header component with app branding and navigation buttons (Home, Location Finder, Help, Share) that trigger dialogs and hash-based navigation.
frontend/src/components/HelpContactDialo: Dialog component displaying contact information for Community Health pest management services, including phone number (541-553-2352) and service area (97761).
frontend/src/components/HomePage.tsx: Landing page with hero section and navigation grid of seven cards (Scanner, Identify, Habitats, Prevention, Treatment, Guides, Find Local Help) that route to different app sections via hash navigation.
frontend/src/components/LocationFinder.t: Google Maps integration component with search functionality to find and display locations, using Places API for autocomplete and place details with marker management.
frontend/src/components/pests/ArmyAntsCo: Informational component providing detailed content about army ants including identification, physical characteristics, species distribution, habitats, behavior, and safety notices. Uses card-based layout with icons for different sections.
frontend/src/components/pests/BeetlesCon: Educational component displaying information about common household beetles including identification guides, species types, infestation signs, entry points, and attractants. Organized in cards with descriptive sections.
frontend/src/components/pests/BlackAntsC: Informational component covering black ant identification, common species, nesting locations, attractants, and safety information. Structured with cards and includes visual icons for each section.
frontend/src/components/pests/BlackStink: Educational component providing details about black stink bugs including physical characteristics, common species, entry behavior, hiding locations, and handling tips. Features card-based layout with alert for odor warning.
frontend/src/components/pests/CarpenterA: React component displaying comprehensive information about carpenter ants including identification, habitats, prevention, and control methods with warnings about structural damage and professional treatment recommendations.
frontend/src/components/pests/Cockroache: React component providing detailed cockroach identification guide, common species information, infestation signs, habitats, and control methods with safety notices about pesticide use.
frontend/src/components/pests/CommonHous: React component describing house fly identification, life cycle, breeding sources, attractants, and prevention methods with information about disease transmission risks.
frontend/src/components/pests/EarwigsCon: React component explaining earwig identification, behavior patterns, indoor habitats, and control strategies with reassurance that they are generally harmless nuisance pests.
frontend/src/components/pests/HeadLiceCo: React component covering head lice identification, transmission methods, checking procedures, and treatment information with emphasis that they are not related to hygiene and are common among children.
frontend/src/components/pests/LargeFlies: React component displaying identification, habitat, and prevention information for large flies including blow flies, flesh flies, cluster flies, and horse flies. Includes cards with physical characteristics, signs of infestation, and control methods.
frontend/src/components/pests/MiceConten: React component providing comprehensive information about mice identification, signs of infestation, nesting habits, entry points, and prevention strategies. Includes health warnings about disease transmission and structural damage.
frontend/src/components/pests/MothsLarva: React component detailing moth and larvae identification for both clothes moths and pantry moths. Covers physical characteristics, infestation signs, common locations, and prevention methods for fabric and food damage.
frontend/src/components/pests/RedAntsCon: React component with safety warnings and information about red ants including fire ants. Covers species identification, physical characteristics, nesting locations, and aggressive behavior with emphasis on sting dangers.
frontend/src/components/pests/ScorpionsC: React component providing scorpion identification, safety warnings about stings, habitat information, and behavioral patterns. Includes details on common North American species and UV light detection methods.
frontend/src/components/pests/SpidersCon: React component displaying comprehensive spider identification, safety warnings, and information about venomous species (black widow). Includes physical characteristics, common indoor species, signs of presence, and safety protocols using shadcn/ui Card and Alert components.
frontend/src/components/pests/TicksConte: React component providing tick identification, behavior patterns, habitat information, and health warnings about tick-borne diseases. Covers life cycles, feeding behavior, common exposure locations, and prevention measures using Card and Alert UI components.
frontend/src/components/pests/WoodBeetle: React component detailing wood-boring beetle identification, damage signs, and infestation sources. Includes information on different beetle species (powderpost, old house borers), damage characteristics, and common indoor locations using Card and Alert components.
frontend/src/components/PhotoScanner.tsx: Camera and image upload component with editing capabilities (rotation, zoom, crop, enhance), saved scans gallery, and persistence features for pest identification photos.
Component that fetches and displays downloadable PDF guides filtered by content type, with download functionality and loading/empty states.
frontend/src/components/QrCodePage.tsx: Full-page component for displaying and sharing a QR code linking to the app, with options to copy the URL or download the QR code image.
frontend/src/components/SavedScansGaller: Gallery component displaying saved pest scans with filtering by tags, reordering, deletion with confirmation, and date formatting.
frontend/src/components/SavedScanTagsEdi: Component for managing tags on saved scans, allowing users to add, edit, and remove tags with inline editing and keyboard shortcuts.
frontend/src/components/sections/Habitat: React component displaying bed bug habitat information including common hiding spots (mattresses, furniture, walls) and feeding behavior patterns. Features smooth scrolling navigation and uses Card components with images to illustrate hiding locations.
frontend/src/components/sections/HeatTre: React AlertDialog component showing critical safety warnings before heat treatment, including ammunition removal, furniture disposal guidance, and occupancy restrictions. Implements auto-focus on primary action button when dialog opens.
frontend/src/components/sections/Identif: React component for bed bug identification covering adult bugs, life stages (eggs, nymphs), and bite marks. Uses Card components with images and smooth scrolling navigation to help users recognize bed bugs at different developmental stages.
frontend/src/components/sections/Prevent: React component displaying bed bug prevention tips organized into cards covering travel precautions, used furniture inspection, and home protection strategies with images and detailed instructions.
frontend/src/components/sections/Treatme: React component for bed bug heat treatment guidance featuring a comprehensive checklist (before/during/after phases) with progress tracking, reminder dialogs, and completion statistics using custom hooks for persistence.
frontend/src/components/ShareQrCodeDialo: Modal dialog for sharing the app via QR code or URL link, with copy and download functionality and option to open full QR page.
frontend/src/components/TechnicianFinder: Component for searching pest control technicians by zip code, displaying results with location formatting and optional map view with boundary data.
frontend/src/components/TechnicianMap.ts: React component that renders a Google Map displaying technician locations as markers and optional ZIP code boundary polygons. Manages map state, markers, polygons, and info windows with error handling and bounds calculation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that manages Internet Computer actor instances with authentication, creating anonymous or authenticated actors based on identity state and invalidating dependent queries on actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useGoogleMaps.ts: Custom React hook that loads the Google Maps JavaScript API script with places library, managing loading state and errors with singleton pattern to prevent duplicate script loading.
frontend/src/hooks/useHashRoute.ts: Custom React hook providing hash-based routing functionality with hash normalization, navigation helpers, and route matching without external router dependencies.
frontend/src/hooks/useHeatTreatmentCheck: Custom React hook managing heat treatment checklist item completion state with localStorage persistence, providing toggle, reset, and completion statistics functionality with graceful fallback for unavailable storage.
Custom React hook managing a first-visit reminder dialog state for the heat treatment checklist, persisting confirmation status to localStorage with fallback for unavailable storage.
frontend/src/hooks/useImageEditor.ts: Custom React hook providing image editing capabilities including rotation, zoom, enhancement, and export functionality, processing images asynchronously with debouncing to prevent concurrent operations.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useNextRoute.ts: Hook that provides navigation to the next route in a predefined sequence (scanner → identify → habitats → prevention → treatment → guides → findLocalHelp) using hash-based routing.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks for fetching printable guides, technicians by zip code, and zip code boundary coordinates from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useSavedScans.ts: Hook for managing saved pest scans in localStorage with CRUD operations, tagging support, reordering, and graceful fallback when storage is unavailable.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining a warm educational color palette for light and dark modes, plus base styles and checklist component classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the main App component.
frontend/src/types/google-maps.d.ts: TypeScript type declarations for Google Maps JavaScript API including Map, Marker, InfoWindow, Polygon, Places service, and related interfaces.
frontend/src/utils/assert.ts: Type-safe assertion utilities including invariant checks, exhaustiveness helpers, and null/undefined guards for runtime type narrowing.
frontend/src/utils/clipboard.ts: Safe clipboard copy utility with modern API and fallback support, returning structured success/error results for user feedback.
frontend/src/utils/imageProcessing.ts: Provides canvas-based image manipulation functions including rotate, enhance (contrast/brightness), zoom, and crop operations that return data URLs.
frontend/src/utils/qr.ts: Utilities for generating QR code URLs via external API and downloading them as PNG files with error handling.
frontend/src/utils/safeStorage.ts: Safe localStorage wrapper with availability detection and non-throwing get/set/remove operations that return result objects.
frontend/src/utils/shareUrl.ts: Utility functions to compute shareable app URLs, returning either the origin or full URL including hash.
frontend/src/utils/useOnUnmount.ts: React hook that safely executes cleanup logic (sync or async) when a component unmounts, used for camera stream cleanup.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system, custom theme extensions, animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking architectural notes, features, and a pending feature request to make quick tip lightbulb icons clickable with section navigation.
